named_budget.resource: one mutually exclusive response-team week per epoch
named_budget.matching_rule: Every policy receives exactly the same 4032 team-hours. M/T/R hours are mutually exclusive uses of that one scalar budget, not three separately purchased resources.

equal_access_envelope.exogenous_production: identical across policies under common random numbers
forbidden: superior separately purchased dispatch or handling capacity
nonzero raw-material or ration mass residual

endogenous_outcome_flows_not_named_budge.interpretation: Realized service from already-positioned finite reserve stock; it increments only after delivery. Equalizing it would condition on an intended service consequence of action R.
Realized internal transfer into the reserve after the simulator removes the same quantity from Op9/SB stock and completes the frozen lead.
Count of target-gap processes launched. The v1 simulator assigns no separately finite departure, vehicle-hour, handling-hour, fuel, budget or order-processing resource to this counter.

mandatory_conservation_and_reporting.comparison_rule: Report all outcome flows for every policy and require the named budget and equal-access envelope to be identical. Do not relabel outcome-flow equality as a frozen resource requirement after results.

source_evidence.fact: Target-gap requests launch a process; replenishment removes source stock before transit; issued and replenished ledgers increment only after physical delivery.
The evaluator freezes equal reserve access and reports team-hours, reserve flows, pending/in-transit stock and mass residuals.
The thesis supports periodic strategic-inventory replenishment at Op3, Op5 and Op9, but does not define this event-driven forward-reserve transport and handling resource.
The forward reserve is explicitly a researcher extension with finite 10000-unit stock and conserved Op9 replenishment.

domain_validity.reason: The executable v1 accounting rule is frozen, but the thesis does not establish that replenishment and issue use non-scarce routine transport/handling or that one real response team can serve M/T/R.
domain_validity.if_separate_resource_is_finite: Freeze a new contract naming its units, capacity, lead/turnaround, concurrency, sharing and cancellation/reassignment rules; require componentwise non-superior use before any further evaluation.

exact_garrido_question: For the proposed forward reserve, when an R24 requirement is served and the reserve orders back up to 10000 units from Op9: (1) is replenishment only a stock-conserving internal transfer using non-scarce routine order-processing and transport, or does each request/transfer consume a separately finite departure, convoy/vehicle-hour, handling crew-hour, fuel/budget or order-processing slot; (2) is that resource shared with Op10/Op12 or with the M/T/R response team; (3) is the 5000-unit R capability a maximum per R24 event, per week or per episode, and does each issue consume team or handling time; and (4) is the initial 10000-unit stock prepositioned before the episode and how is it costed? If any separate resource is finite, please give its capacity, units, lead/turnaround, concurrency and cancellation/reassignment rules.

claim_boundary.statement: This verdict resolves only what v1 budgets and reports. It neither validates the researcher-introduced physics nor supplies the unresolved open-loop frontier or resource-restricted PI ceiling.
